K0700B_IV_TUBE_DAILY_CD K0700B Average Fluid Intake by IV Or Tube Feeding Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the average fluid intake per day by IV or tube feeding. discontinued 9/30/2013
394 K0710A1_CAL_PRNTRL_PRIOR_CD K0710A1_CAL_PRNTRL_PRIOR_CD K0710A1 Percent Caloric Intake Through Parenteral/Tube Feeding While Not a Resident Code. CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the proportion of total calories that the resident received through parenteral or tube feeding while not a
